provisions.title: AMENDING EXECUTUVE ORDER NO.607
provisions.content:
MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO.
              Executive Order No. 678.
            REDUCTION 0%SALARIES.
                  0. G. No. 3265.

    By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo Domingo, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated.
    ARTICLE 1. All reductions of salaries effected by order
lof the Military Government throughout the calendar year 1921
are hereby declared valid as of date of going into affect thereof.
Such reductions shall continue in full force and effect until
cotherwise provided by law.
     ARTICLE 2. All laws or parts of laws in conflict with
this Order, are hereby repeaIed.
                                  S. S. ROBISON,
                          Rear-Admiral, United States Navy,
                         Military Governor of Santo Domingc.

Santo Domingo, b. R.,
October 17, 1921.

ecutive Order No. 661, is hereby further amende,d as follows:

read $64,562.66 instead of $63,662.66.

 $7,017.84to $6,047 84.

        ARTICLE 3. All laws or parts of laws in conflict here-.
